title: Regenerate WordPress Security Keys and Salts
description: Replace default AUTH_KEY, SECURE_AUTH_KEY, LOGGED_IN_KEY, NONCE_KEY and corresponding salts with unique values.

implementation.apache: Edit wp-config.php and regenerate at https://api.wordpress.org/secret-key/1.1/salt/

verification: All AUTH_KEY, SECURE_AUTH_KEY, LOGGED_IN_KEY, NONCE_KEY are unique and not default/empty

title: Set Secure File and Directory Permissions
description: Files should be 644, directories 755. wp-config.php should be 600 or 440.

implementation.apache: chmod -R 644 /var/www/html/*; chmod -R 755 /var/www/html/*; chmod 600 wp-config.php

verification: ls -la shows 644 for files, 755 for dirs, 600 for wp-config.php

title: Password Protect wp-admin Directory
description: Add HTTP Basic Authentication to wp-admin to prevent unauthorized access even if WordPress auth is bypassed.

implementation.apache: htpasswd -c /etc/apache2/.htpasswd admin; Add AuthType Basic in wp-admin/.htaccess
implementation.nginx: Use nginx auth_basic; point to htpasswd file in location block

verification: Accessing /wp-admin prompts for HTTP Basic Auth credentials before WordPress login

title: Disable XML-RPC if Not Needed
description: XML-RPC is a common attack vector for brute force amplification and pingback DDoS. Disable if unused.

implementation.apache: Add to .htaccess: Files xmlrpc.php -> deny from all; OR use plugin

verification: POST to /xmlrpc.php returns 403 Forbidden or 404 Not Found

title: Restrict REST API Access
description: Limit REST API endpoints to authenticated users or specific IP ranges. Exposes user data by default.

implementation.apache: Use plugin or add RewriteRule to block /wp-json/wp/v2/users

verification: GET /wp-json/wp/v2/users returns 403 or requires authentication

title: Change Default Database Table Prefix
description: Change wp_ to a random prefix during install or via migration to prevent SQLi enumeration.

implementation.apache: Edit wp-config.php: table_prefix = 'xyz123_'; rename all DB tables
implementation.nginx: Same process - edit wp-config.php and rename tables

verification: SHOW TABLES shows custom prefix, no tables starting with wp_

title: Disable WP_DEBUG and Error Display
description: Debug mode exposes paths, database names, and stack traces that aid attackers.

implementation.apache: wp-config.php: define('WP_DEBUG', false); define('WP_DEBUG_DISPLAY', false); ini_set('display_errors', 0);

verification: Intentionally trigger an error; generic message shown, no path disclosure

title: Disable Theme and Plugin File Editor
description: Disallow editing files through WordPress admin to limit damage from compromised accounts.

implementation.apache: wp-config.php: define('DISALLOW_FILE_EDIT', true);

verification: Appearance > Editor and Plugins > Editor show disabled message

title: Force HTTPS/SSL for All Pages
description: Redirect HTTP to HTTPS and enable HSTS. Set FORCE_SSL_ADMIN in wp-config.php.

implementation.apache: RewriteCond %{QUERY_STRING} base64_encode.*(.*) [OR]; RewriteCond %{QUERY_STRING} (.*) { [OR] -> deny

verification: Access http:// redirects to https://; admin login enforces SSL

title: Add HTTP Security Headers
description: Configure X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, and CSP.

implementation.apache: Header set X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN; Header set X-Content-Type-Options nosniff; Header set Referrer-Policy
implementation.nginx: add_header X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN; add_header X-Content-Type-Options nosniff

verification: curl -I shows all security headers present

title: Implement Automated Backups
description: Automate daily backups of database and files using UpdraftPlus or WP CLI cron jobs.

implementation.apache: Install UpdraftPlus plugin and schedule daily backups to remote storage
implementation.nginx: Same plugin setup via WordPress admin

verification: Backup files exist with recent timestamps in configured storage

title: Audit and Remove Unused Plugins
description: Deactivate and delete unused plugins. Keep all active plugins updated. Check for known vulnerabilities.

implementation.apache: WordPress admin: Plugins > Installed Plugins > delete inactive plugins
implementation.linux: wp plugin list --status=inactive --path=/var/www/html; wp plugin delete inactive-slug

verification: Only required plugins are active and updated to latest version

title: Remove Unused Themes and Child Theme Security
description: Delete unused themes, especially default WordPress themes. Keep parent and child themes updated.

implementation.apache: Appearance > Themes > delete inactive themes

verification: Only active theme (and parent if child) remains in wp-content/themes

title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
description: Require 2FA for administrator accounts using plugins like Wordfence or Two Factor.

implementation.apache: Install Two Factor or Wordfence Login Security plugin; configure TOTP for admin role
implementation.nginx: Same plugin setup via WordPress admin

verification: Admin login requires TOTP code or backup code after password

title: Change Default Login URL
description: Obfuscate /wp-login.php and /wp-admin to reduce brute force attack surface.

implementation.apache: Install WPS Hide Login or Change wp-admin Login plugin; set custom slug

verification: Accessing /wp-login.php redirects to 404; new custom URL works for login

title: Enable Database Repair and Optimize
description: Add repair constant to wp-config.php for emergency table repair. Remove after use.

implementation.apache: wp-config.php: define('WP_ALLOW_REPAIR', true); visit /wp-admin/maint/repair.php

verification: Database tables optimized and repaired; constant removed after operation

title: Hide WordPress Version Number
description: Remove WordPress version from RSS feeds and meta generator to prevent targeted attacks.

implementation.apache: functions.php: remove_action('wp_head', 'wp_generator'); add_filter('the_generator', '__return_empty_string');

verification: View page source does not contain meta generator WordPress version tag

title: Prevent Execution of PHP in Uploads Directory
description: Uploaded files in /wp-content/uploads should never be executable as PHP.

implementation.apache: Add .htaccess in uploads: php_flag engine off; or FilesMatch deny all for .php

verification: Upload PHP file to uploads; direct access returns 403

title: Block Bad Requests and Query Strings
description: Block requests containing eval, base64, and common SQLi patterns at the server level.

implementation.apache: RewriteCond %{QUERY_STRING} base64_encode.*(.*) [OR]; RewriteCond %{QUERY_STRING} (.*) { [OR] -> deny

verification: Request with ?eval=base64_encode returns 403

title: Implement Login Attempt Limiting
description: Block repeated failed login attempts to prevent brute force and credential stuffing.

implementation.apache: Install Wordfence or Limit Login Attempts Reloaded plugin; set to 3 retries then 1 hour lockout
implementation.nginx: Same plugin approach or nginx limit_req

verification: 3 failed logins trigger lockout message and email notification

title: Restrict CORS for REST API and AJAX
description: Configure allowed origins for WordPress REST API and admin-ajax to prevent CSRF and data exfil.

implementation.apache: Header set Access-Control-Allow-Origin https://example.com

verification: Cross-origin request from unauthorized domain returns error

title: Harden Cookie Settings with HttpOnly and Secure Flags
description: Set COOKIE_DOMAIN, COOKIEPATH, and session cookie flags (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite).

implementation.apache: wp-config.php: ini_set('session.cookie_httponly', 1); ini_set('session.cookie_secure', 1);

verification: Browser dev tools show httponly and secure flags on auth cookies

title: Disable Trackbacks and Pingbacks
description: Trackbacks and pingbacks are rarely used and are a common DDoS and spam vector.

implementation.apache: Settings > Discussion > uncheck Allow link notifications; code in functions.php to disable xmlrpc
implementation.nginx: Same WordPress setting and functions.php code

verification: Posts show pingbacks/trackbacks disabled; XMLRPC pingback methods unavailable

title: Replace WP-Cron with Server Cron
description: Disable wp-cron.php triggered on page load; use real server cron for better performance and security.

implementation.apache: wp-config.php: define('DISABLE_WP_CRON', true); cron: */5 * * * * wget -q -O - https://example.com/wp-cron.php > /dev/null 2>&1
implementation.nginx: Same wp-config.php constant; use cron with curl or wget

verification: No wp-cron.php calls on page loads; only every 5 minutes via cron

title: Secure WP-CLI Access
description: Restrict WP-CLI to specific users, require SSH key authentication, and log all CLI commands.

implementation.apache: Not applicable - WP-CLI runs on shell
implementation.nginx: Not applicable - WP-CLI runs on shell
implementation.linux: sudo chown root:root /usr/local/bin/wp; sudo chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/wp; allow only deploy user

verification: Only designated deploy user can execute wp commands; others get permission denied
